name: Assistant Memory
tagline: Lets the assistant remember things you tell it across conversations. Memories stay on your machine.
description:
Built-in tool worker that gives the BFrost assistant persistent memory. Tell it your preferences, recurring instructions, or facts to remember — they are stored locally and recalled automatically in future conversations.

This is a core infrastructure worker — it ships with every BFrost installation and cannot be removed.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Ships with BFrost. No standalone install needed.
